name: Pumpkin Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pumpkin by buttering a heavy cast iron frying pan and cooking over medium heat, stirring and turning until it reduces to 1 1/2 cups and is slightly browned.
2. Place the browned pumpkin in a bowl and stir in flour and brown sugar until thoroughly mixed.
3. Add spices (cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg) and eggs; beat well.
4. Scald milk and add canned milk to scalded milk.
5. Mix all milks with the pumpkin mixture until well combined.
6. Transfer the mixture to a greased casserole dish and place it in a larger casserole filled with hot water that reaches halfway up the side of the inner casserole.
7. Bake at 325°F until a knife inserted comes out clean when tested.
8. Serve hot or cold.
